title: InMyBox — DMARC Intelligence Platform
excerpt: AI-powered low-cost platform built to simplify email authentication reporting, visibility, and security posture management for businesses.

title: DMARC Labs
excerpt: Open-source DMARC aggregate report analyzer. Parses XML reports into actionable intelligence so domain owners can see who is sending mail on their behalf — and stop spoofing fast.

title: Career Intelligence Platform
excerpt: A student-focused intelligence platform designed to provide career clarity, growth roadmaps, and skill direction using AI-powered insights.

title: Digital Waste Optimizer
excerpt: A platform built to help businesses identify underutilized digital resources and reduce unnecessary technology spend.

title: Innovation Network Platform
excerpt: A collaborative ecosystem for innovators, thinkers, and builders to share ideas, showcase products, and solve real-world digital problems together.

title: CIS Made Easy
excerpt: A lightweight tool that helps organisations tailor CIS benchmarks to their environment without wading through hundreds of generic controls. Less paperwork, more posture.

title: Ensirius Web Security
excerpt: A browser extension that lets organisations enforce safe-browsing policies through simple, deployable rules — no proxy, no agent, no bloat.

title: AppLocker Management Console
excerpt: A practical management layer for Microsoft AppLocker — still one of the most underrated tools to stop unwanted software from running on Windows endpoints.

title: GDrive Scanner
excerpt: Scans a Google Drive and reports file types, MIME types, and last-modified timestamps — useful for data classification, cleanup, and shadow-IT discovery.

title: Thesis Collective
excerpt: Marketing site for a professional academic writing service. Modern, fully responsive, dark/light themes, and a clear pitch for PhD-level expertise.
